items.name: Ozzie Lenka
items.text: Recommended for those who are just starting a business and want to have a website, the price can be adjusted to your needs and you are guided to manage the website until you can do it yourself.

items.name: Syahrul Gunawan
items.role: IT Staff, Dinas Arpusda Provinsi Jawa Tengah
items.text: Thank you to the Alvin Dio Prakosa team who completed the arpusda.jatengprov.go.id website very well. The design is modern, features are complete, and easy to access. Communication is fast and the results met our expectations. We are satisfied and recommend Alvin Dio Prakosa as a trusted website creation partner.

items.name: Alvin Dio Prakosa Customer
items.text: Alvin Dio Prakosa's service is very satisfying. A professional, responsive team, always ready to help. The website created looks professional and suits my business needs. Highly recommended!

faq.heading: Still Have Questions?

items.q: Why do I need a website for my business?
items.a: A website allows you to convey information about your products, services and increase the visibility of your business globally, active 24 hours a day.

items.q: How much does it cost to create a website?
items.a: Website prices start from 1.1 million rupiah depending on your website needs.

items.q: How long does it take to build the website?
items.a: Website creation takes 3-5 working days, the work is adjusted to the complexity of the website you order.

items.q: Is there a warranty after the website is done?
items.a: Yes, we provide a lifetime warranty for every website we create. We also provide periodic maintenance and support services to ensure your website always runs well.

website_bisnis.hero_subtext: Building a website is now easier and faster! Increase credibility, reach more customers, and deliver a professional digital experience. Let's build your digital brand with Alvin Dio Prakosa!
website_bisnis.about_heading: Modern Website, Smart Step to Grow Your Business
website_bisnis.about_p1: In the fast-paced digital era, going online is no longer optional — it's essential. Make your website your strongest business asset working 24/7, reaching new customers and building solid brand trust.
website_bisnis.about_p2: A well-designed business website increases company credibility, makes it easier for customers to find your products or services, and opens greater conversion opportunities with every visit.
website_bisnis.quote: "Enhance Your Business Image with a Professional Website That Inspires Trust"
website_bisnis.cocok_desc: Business Website is suitable for various types of business owners who need a professional digital presence to expand market reach and build strong customer trust online.
website_bisnis.faq_subtext: Everything you need to know before starting a professional and impactful business website.
website_bisnis.faq_0_a: A business website is specifically designed to promote and operate a business online, helping companies reach more customers and increase their credibility.
website_bisnis.faq_1_q: How long does it take to build a business website?
website_bisnis.faq_1_a: On average, a business website takes 5–10 business days, depending on the complexity of features and number of pages required.
website_bisnis.faq_2_q: Can I manage the business website myself?
website_bisnis.faq_2_a: Yes, we build websites with an easy-to-use CMS so you can update content, add products, and manage the website without technical expertise.
website_bisnis.faq_3_q: Is the business website mobile friendly?
website_bisnis.faq_3_a: Absolutely! All business websites we create are responsive and mobile-friendly so they display perfectly on all devices.
website_bisnis.faq_4_q: Can the business website display an online store?
website_bisnis.faq_4_a: Yes, we can integrate e-commerce features into your business website so customers can browse and buy products directly.
website_bisnis.faq_5_a: Yes, every business website we create is optimized with an SEO-friendly structure to help your business appear on Google's first page.
website_bisnis.faq_6_q: Is there a warranty after the website is completed?
website_bisnis.faq_6_a: Yes, we provide lifetime technical support to ensure your website always runs optimally.
website_bisnis.faq_7_q: Can the Business Website be Optimized for SEO?
website_bisnis.faq_7_a: Yes, business websites can be optimized with on-page and off-page SEO techniques to increase search engine visibility and bring more organic traffic.

website_landing.hero_heading: Best Landing Page Website Creation Service for Your Business
website_landing.hero_subtext: Building a website is now easier and faster! Increase credibility, reach more customers, and deliver a professional digital experience. Let's build your digital brand with Alvin Dio Prakosa!
website_landing.about_heading: Boost Your Business with a Website Designed to Grow
website_landing.about_p: This service is designed to help your business grow and thrive. With a professional look, optimal performance, and superior features, your website is ready to become a reliable business growth engine.
website_landing.about2_heading: Professional Website, The Main Foundation of Your Business Growth
website_landing.about2_p1: A website is not just an online page — it's the digital face of your business. With the right design, strong structure, and seamless user experience, a professional website becomes your most important asset in your business growth journey.
website_landing.about2_p2: Alvin Dio Prakosa is here to ensure every element of your website is strategically designed — from stunning visuals to conversion-supporting functions, all working together to take your business to the next level.
website_landing.quote: "Build a Strong First Impression with a Professional Website Ready to Take Your Business to the Next Level."
website_landing.metric_title: Boost Your Business Reach & Impressive SEO
website_landing.cocok_desc: Landing Page is suitable for anyone who wants to increase conversions, whether for product promotion, services, events, or targeted and effective digital marketing campaigns.
website_landing.faq_subtext: Everything you need to know before creating an effective and professional Landing Page.
website_landing.faq_0_q: What is a Landing Page Service?
website_landing.faq_0_a: A Landing Page is a single website page specifically designed to convert visitors into customers or business prospects through focused content and a strong CTA.
website_landing.faq_1_q: Why is a Landing Page Very Helpful for Business?
website_landing.faq_1_a: A Landing Page helps your business by increasing conversions, clarifying marketing messages, and providing a focused experience to visitors to encourage them to take action.
website_landing.faq_2_q: Can a Landing Page Support Ads?
website_landing.faq_2_a: Yes, a Landing Page is very effective for supporting Google Ads and social media campaigns because the ad message and the page can be aligned to increase conversions.
website_landing.faq_3_q: Can a Landing Page be Optimized for SEO?
website_landing.faq_3_a: Yes, a Landing Page can be optimized with on-page SEO techniques to increase search engine visibility and bring quality organic traffic.
website_landing.faq_4_q: Why is a Landing Page Better than a Regular Website?
website_landing.faq_4_a: A Landing Page is specifically designed for one conversion goal, making it more focused and effective compared to a general website with lots of navigation and distractions.
website_landing.faq_5_q: Can a Landing Page be Integrated with WhatsApp?
website_landing.faq_5_a: Absolutely! We always integrate a WhatsApp button into the Landing Page to make it easy for potential customers to contact you directly.
website_landing.faq_6_q: How Long Can a Landing Page be Used?
website_landing.faq_6_a: A Landing Page can be used as long as your business operates. We also provide lifetime technical support to ensure your page always runs optimally.
website_landing.faq_7_q: Can a Landing Page Function as an Online Store?
website_landing.faq_7_a: A Landing Page can be equipped with simple order or payment features, but for a more complete online store, we recommend a dedicated e-commerce website.

website_ukm.hero_subtext: Building a website is now easier and faster! Increase credibility, reach more customers, and deliver a professional digital experience. Let's build your digital brand with Alvin Dio Prakosa!
website_ukm.about_heading: Modern Website to Grow Your SME Today
website_ukm.about_p1: In the fast-paced digital era, having a modern website is no longer an option but a necessity for SMEs. A website is not just a place to put information, but a professional representation of your business that can be accessed anytime and anywhere.
website_ukm.about_p2: A website designed specifically for SMEs helps build trust, explains products or services clearly, and creates a pleasant user experience.
website_ukm.quote: "Build a Strong First Impression with a Professional Website for Your SME."
website_ukm.cocok_heading: Who is the UKM Website for?
website_ukm.cocok_desc: UKM Website is suitable for various small and medium business owners who want to build a professional digital presence, expand customer reach, and increase online business trust.
website_ukm.faq_subtext: Everything you need to know before starting an effective and professional UKM website.
website_ukm.faq_0_a: A UKM Website is specifically designed to help small and medium businesses have a digital presence with a professional appearance, easy to manage, and affordable price.
website_ukm.faq_1_q: Can the UKM Website display my products?
website_ukm.faq_1_a: Yes, the UKM Website can be equipped with a product page, photo gallery, service description, and contact information so customers can get to know your business better.
website_ukm.faq_2_q: How long does it take to build a UKM Website?
website_ukm.faq_2_a: On average, a UKM Website takes 3–5 business days, depending on the number of pages and the level of customization desired.
website_ukm.faq_3_q: Can I manage the website myself after it's done?
website_ukm.faq_3_a: Absolutely! We will provide a guide and short training so you can update content, add products, and manage the website easily.
website_ukm.faq_4_q: Will the UKM Website appear on Google?
website_ukm.faq_4_a: Yes, we build websites with an SEO-friendly structure so they have a greater chance of appearing in Google search results.
website_ukm.faq_5_q: Is there a warranty after the website is completed?
website_ukm.faq_5_a: Yes, we provide lifetime technical support to ensure your website always runs well.
website_ukm.faq_6_q: Can the design be customized to my brand?
website_ukm.faq_6_a: Absolutely! All design elements will be customized to match your brand's colors, logo, and visual style to look professional and consistent.
website_ukm.faq_7_q: Can the UKM Website be Optimized for SEO?
website_ukm.faq_7_a: Yes, the UKM Website can be optimized with an SEO-friendly structure, proper keyword usage, and meta tags to make it easier to appear in Google search results.

iklan_ads.hero_subtext: Increase your business visibility with targeted Google Ads. Reach more potential customers, increase conversions, and get maximum ROI from every rupiah you invest.
iklan_ads.about_heading: Help Your Business Appear at the Right Moment
iklan_ads.about_p1: Google Ads allows your business to appear at the top of search results instantly. With the right strategy, every click has the potential to become a loyal customer who generates real income for your business.
iklan_ads.about_p2: Our expert team will design, manage, and continuously optimize your ad campaigns to ensure your advertising budget works as hard as possible and delivers the best ROI.
iklan_ads.quote: "Precisely targeted ads don't just bring clicks — they deliver real customers who contribute to the sustainable growth of your business."
iklan_ads.about2_heading: Fast Sales. Let Potential Customers Find You Faster.
iklan_ads.about2_p1: With professional Google Ads management, every rupiah of your advertising budget is optimized to deliver the best results. We ensure your ads reach the most relevant audience ready to buy.
iklan_ads.about2_p2: Our data-driven strategy allows real-time ad adjustments to maximize conversions and minimize the cost per new customer acquisition.
iklan_ads.faq_subtext: Everything you need to know about our Google Ads Service.
iklan_ads.faq_0_a: Google Ads Service is a paid ad campaign management service on the Google platform, helping your business appear at the top of search results instantly to reach the right potential customers.
iklan_ads.faq_1_q: Why does my business need Google Ads?
iklan_ads.faq_1_a: Google Ads allows your business to appear in front of potential customers who are actively searching for your products or services, making conversion opportunities much higher than conventional advertising.
iklan_ads.faq_2_q: Who is the target audience that can be reached?
iklan_ads.faq_2_a: With Google Ads, you can target audiences based on keywords, location, age, interests, and online behavior — ensuring ads only appear to the most relevant people.
iklan_ads.faq_3_q: How quickly can ad results be seen?
iklan_ads.faq_3_a: Google Ads results can be seen within hours after the campaign is activated, making it the fastest solution to bring new traffic and prospects to your business.
iklan_ads.faq_4_q: Is there an ad performance report?
iklan_ads.faq_4_a: Yes, we provide comprehensive monthly reports covering clicks, impressions, conversions, cost per click, and optimization recommendations to maximize your ad ROI.
iklan_ads.faq_5_q: What is the minimum budget for Google Ads?
iklan_ads.faq_5_a: The minimum budget varies depending on the industry and target market. Our team will help determine the most efficient budget to achieve your business goals.
iklan_ads.faq_6_q: Can the ad be turned off at any time?
iklan_ads.faq_6_a: Yes, Google Ads can be activated and deactivated at any time as needed, giving you full control over your marketing budget.
iklan_ads.faq_7_q: Does this service include landing page optimization?
iklan_ads.faq_7_a: Yes, we also provide landing page optimization recommendations to ensure visitors coming from ads have the best experience and high conversion opportunities.

seo_basic.hero_subtext: Consistent website optimization is the key to your business's online visibility. We help keep your website performance optimal in search engines, ensuring the right target keywords, and continuously updating SEO strategies so your business stays relevant, competitive, and easy to find.
seo_basic.about_heading: Keep Website Performance Stable in Search Engines
seo_basic.about_p1: With SEO Basic Maintenance service, we ensure your website is always optimized according to the latest Google standards. A stable website ranking means more organic visitors and a steady flow of business opportunities.
seo_basic.about_p2: Our SEO expert team will monitor, analyze, and optimize your website regularly to ensure your business always appears on the first page of search results.
seo_basic.process_2: Performing SEO Basic Maintenance on Website
seo_basic.quote: "SEO is not about being fast, but about staying on top. This service is perfect for those who want their website to stay optimal, fast, and relevant on Google. Focus on your business, let us take care of the journey."
seo_basic.about2_heading: Optimize Your Website with Targeted SEO Maintenance
seo_basic.about2_p1: A website without SEO maintenance is like a store whose door is rarely opened. Alvin Dio Prakosa's SEO Basic Maintenance service ensures your website is always optimized — from loading speed to relevant content structure.
seo_basic.about2_p2: With routine monitoring and continuous strategy adjustments, we help your website maintain the best position in search engines so customers can find your business easily.
seo_basic.faq_subtext: Everything you need to know about our SEO Basic Maintenance Service.
seo_basic.faq_0_q: What is SEO Basic Maintenance Service?
seo_basic.faq_0_a: SEO Basic Maintenance Service is a website maintenance service focused on periodic search engine optimization, ensuring your website stays relevant and easy to find on Google.
seo_basic.faq_1_q: Who is this service suitable for?
seo_basic.faq_1_a: This service is suitable for website owners who want to keep their SEO performance stable without having to manage it themselves every month.
seo_basic.faq_2_q: What is included in basic SEO maintenance?
seo_basic.faq_2_a: Includes meta tag updates, page speed optimization, content updates, keyword ranking monitoring, and necessary technical SEO fixes.
seo_basic.faq_3_q: How often is this service needed?
seo_basic.faq_3_a: Ideally done every month to ensure the website always follows Google algorithm changes and maintains its best position in search results.
seo_basic.faq_4_q: Can this service improve website ranking?
seo_basic.faq_4_a: Yes, consistent SEO maintenance can maintain and improve your website's ranking in search engines over time.
seo_basic.faq_5_q: Is there a monthly report from this service?
seo_basic.faq_5_a: Yes, we provide monthly reports covering keyword ranking progress, traffic statistics, and next optimization recommendations.
seo_basic.faq_6_q: What is the difference between SEO Basic and SEO Premium?
seo_basic.faq_6_a: SEO Basic covers fundamental optimizations needed to maintain performance, while SEO Premium covers more in-depth strategies including link building and content marketing.
seo_basic.faq_7_q: Does this service apply to newly created websites?
seo_basic.faq_7_a: Yes, SEO Basic Maintenance can be applied to both new and existing websites to build a strong SEO foundation from the start.

premium_iklan.hero_subtext: Don't let your website stop growing! With the Premium Maintenance + Ads Service from Alvin Dio Prakosa, ensure your website is always optimal, safe, and continuously attracting new customers every day.
premium_iklan.about_heading: Complete Solution for an Active Website & Growing Business
premium_iklan.about_p1: This service is designed to help your business not just be present, but continue to grow and expand in the digital era. With a combination of routine maintenance and the right advertising strategy, your website will always be optimal and productive.
premium_iklan.about_p2: We ensure every aspect of your website is maintained — from security, speed, to visibility in search engines. Combined with well-managed advertising campaigns, your business is ready to reach more potential customers.
premium_iklan.quote: "Fast, secure, and always up-to-date website — plus a digital advertising strategy that reaches more customers at all times. This service is perfect for those who want their website to stay optimal, fast, and relevant on Google. Focus on you, let us take care of the journey."
premium_iklan.about2_heading: Boost Your Business with a Website Designed to Grow
premium_iklan.about2_p1: Having a website is just the right strategy to make your business continue to grow beyond limits. With our premium maintenance service, your website always works optimally — fast, secure, and ready to convert.
premium_iklan.about2_p2: Combine it with a planned digital advertising strategy to reach new customers and consistently improve your business performance every month.
premium_iklan.faq_subtext: Everything you need to know before starting our trusted Premium Maintenance service.
premium_iklan.faq_0_q: What is Premium Maintenance + Ads Service?
premium_iklan.faq_0_a: Premium Maintenance + Ads Service is a comprehensive service that includes periodic website maintenance as well as digital advertising management to ensure your business continues to grow online.
premium_iklan.faq_1_q: What is included in this premium maintenance service?
premium_iklan.faq_1_a: The service includes content updates, website speed optimization, plugin/theme updates, security monitoring, regular backups, and management of Google Ads or social media campaigns.
premium_iklan.faq_2_q: Why is it important to use this premium maintenance?
premium_iklan.faq_2_a: An unmaintained website is prone to technical issues, performance decline, and security vulnerabilities. With routine maintenance, your business stays running optimally and competitively.
premium_iklan.faq_3_q: How often is this service provided?
premium_iklan.faq_3_a: Maintenance service is provided monthly, covering all technical and digital marketing aspects needed to maintain your website performance and ad effectiveness.
premium_iklan.faq_4_q: Is this service suitable for all types of businesses?
premium_iklan.faq_4_a: Yes, Premium Maintenance + Ads service is suitable for all types of businesses, from SMEs to large companies that want to maintain a strong and consistent digital presence.
premium_iklan.faq_5_q: How to start this premium maintenance service?
premium_iklan.faq_5_a: Contact us via WhatsApp or contact form, and our team will analyze your website needs before preparing the most suitable package.
premium_iklan.faq_6_q: Is there a periodic report from this service?
premium_iklan.faq_6_a: Yes, we provide monthly reports covering website performance, advertising statistics, and strategy recommendations for the following month.
premium_iklan.faq_7_q: Does the advertising service cover social media platforms?
premium_iklan.faq_7_a: Yes, our advertising service covers Google Ads, Facebook Ads, and Instagram Ads according to your business needs and target audience.
